headline: Lululemon Stock Is Falling. What’s Overshadowing Its Earnings Beat.
summary: Lululemon Athletica  stock was falling ahead of the bell Wednesday after offering disappointing guidance for the first quarter and the year ahead.  Lulu reported fourth-quarter results Tuesday which beat expectations, including earnings of $5.01 a share and revenue of $3.6 billion.  Analysts expected the apparel maker and retailer to report earnings of $4.78 a share and revenue of $3.57 billion.

headline: Lululemon just added Chip Bergh, a former Levi's CEO and Swiffer mop creator, to its board
summary: Chip Bergh's 12-year tenure as Levi's CEO is widely regarded as one of the most successful corporate turnarounds in modern retail. He's arguably parachuting into rockier waters at Lululemon than when he joined Levi's.

headline: lululemon (LULU) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Before we get started, I'd like to take this opportunity to remind you that our remarks today will include forward-looking statements reflecting management's current forecast of certain aspects of lululemon's future.  Actual results may differ materially from those contained in or implied by these forward-looking statements due to risks and uncertainties associated with our business, including those we have disclosed in our most recent filings with the SEC, including our annual report on Form 10-K and our quarterly reports on Form 10-Q. Any forward-looking statements that we make on this call are based on assumptions as of today, and we expressly disclaim any obligation or undertaking to update or revise any of these statements as a result of new information or future events.  On today's call, Meghan will share an update on the action plan we laid out for you on our last earnings call.

headline: Is the Lululemon Dip a Buy? The Bull and Bear Case After Earnings, Guidance
summary: Lululemon Athletica (NASDAQ: LULU) reported Q4 fiscal 2025 earnings after the close on March 17, 2026, delivering beats on both revenue and earnings per share. The stock’s reaction was muted, and it remains under significant pressure. Shares are trading near their 52-week low of $156.64, down 51.3% over the past year. The stock’s sharp decline ...
